mcstate2 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Samplers

Function reference

Models

mcstate_model()
Create basic model
mcstate_model_combine()
Combine two models
mcstate_model_properties()
Describe model properties

Domain specific language

mcstate_dsl()
Domain Specific Language for mcstate

Draw samples from a model

mcstate_sample()
Sample from a model
mcstate_sample_continue()
Continue sampling

Samplers

mcstate_sampler_random_walk()
Random Walk Sampler
mcstate_sampler_adaptive()
Adaptive Metropolis-Hastings Sampler
mcstate_sampler_hmc()
Create HMC
mcstate_sampler_nested_random_walk()
Nested Random Walk Sampler

Chain runners

mcstate_runner_parallel()
Run MCMC chain in parallel
mcstate_runner_serial()
Run MCMC chain in series

Tools

mcstate_observer()
Create observer

Random numbers

Utilities for working with random numbers. This code is all imported from dust, and we’ll change it to better suit the needs in this package.

mcstate_rng
Mcstate Random Number Generator
mcstate_rng_distributed_state() mcstate_rng_distributed_pointer()
Create a set of distributed seeds
mcstate_rng_pointer
Create pointer to random number generator stream

On this page
